title: Frontier Score Explorer
description: A working view of policy areas where technological change, public attention, and institutional pressure are beginning to converge.

topics.label: AI governance
topics.explanation: Rapid regulatory activity, technical uncertainty, and international competition make this a high-pressure frontier.

topics.label: Semiconductor policy
topics.explanation: Manufacturing capacity, supply-chain resilience, workforce, and national competitiveness are becoming one policy system.

topics.label: Arctic security
topics.explanation: Climate change, maritime security, critical minerals, and undersea infrastructure are widening the policy field.

topics.label: Defence innovation
topics.explanation: Emerging technology is increasingly shaped by the institutions that connect technical development with collective security needs.
